steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The parabola has roots $10$ and $-5$, so $f(x) = a(x-10)(x+5)$ for some integer $a > 1$. Expanding: $$f(x) = a(x^2 - 5x - 50) = ax^2 - 5ax - 50a$$ so $b = -5a$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $$a + b = a + (-5a) = -4a$$ With the smallest valid integer $a = 2$: $a + b = -4(2) = -8$.
